goal: Independent guard that read-only review, discovery, research, and verification-only agents cannot gain edit tools even when frontmatter and governance grants drift consistently
assertions: PlanAuditor, AssumptionVerifier, ExecutabilityVerifier, CodeMapper, Researcher, and CodeReviewer remain read-only with respect to edit tools.
The denylist rejects edit, edit/createFile, edit/editFiles, and any other edit/ tool in both frontmatter and governance/tool-grants.json.
The guard is independent from manifest/frontmatter consistency, so matching incorrect grants still fail.
